name: dainik-rojgar
description: Mobile app connecting daily wage workers with employers

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.quality:check: markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md" && prettier --check "**/*.{md,json,yml,yaml}" && node frontend/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit -p frontend/tsconfig.json && node backend/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json
